# Neu21Plus Support

## Getting Help

If you are experiencing issues with Neu21Plus:

1. **Check existing issues**: Browse [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/BS-Ji-007/Neu21plus/issues) to see if your problem has already been reported or fixed.
2. **GitHub Discussions**: Ask questions and get help in [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/BS-Ji-007/Neu21plus/discussions).
3. **Bug Reports**: If you found a bug, please open a [Bug Report](https://github.com/BS-Ji-007/Neu21plus/issues/new?template=bug_report.md).

## Common Issues

### The mod doesn't load / crashes on startup
- Make sure you are using **Minecraft 26.1** with **Fabric Loader 0.19.2+**
- Verify you have **Java 25** installed
- Check that **Fabric API** is also installed
- Look at the crash log for specific error messages

### Missing repo data / items not showing
- Run `/neu resetrepo` to re-download the item repository
- Check your internet connection
- The repo URL is `https://github.com/NotEnoughUpdates/NotEnoughUpdates-repo`

### Features from original NEU are missing
- Neu21Plus is a work-in-progress port. Not all features have been ported yet.
- You can request features using the [Port Request](https://github.com/BS-Ji-007/Neu21plus/issues/new?template=port_request.md) template.

## Original NEU Support

For issues with the **original NotEnoughUpdates** (Forge 1.8.9), please visit:
- [Original NEU Discord](https://discord.gg/moulberry)
- [Original NEU GitHub](https://github.com/NotEnoughUpdates/NotEnoughUpdates)
